task_completion.description: Agent logged into the OpenSIS application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or main portal screen is visible, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent searched for and located the student
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search result or student profile page specifically for 'Maria Rodriguez' (Grade 10) is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent accessed the student's enrollment record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enrollment' tab or withdrawal form for Maria Rodriguez is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct drop date and reason
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drop date field is filled with '01/15/2025' (or '2025-01-15') and the drop reason/code dropdown is set to 'Transferred'.
A success confirmation message is shown, or the enrollment record is displayed in a saved state showing the new end date and drop reason.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenSIS web interface in a browser, not API calls or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing MySQL/MariaDB commands to update the student's record directly.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The drop date and reason were entered into the genuine OpenSIS enrollment/withdrawal form, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires withdrawing student 'Maria Rodriguez' (Grade 10) in OpenSIS. The target drop date must be '01/15/2025' (or '2025-01-15' in ISO format). The target drop reason must be 'Transferred' (which corresponds to drop code 201). The agent must use the web interface to update her enrollment record with this end date and drop code.
